## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Schema/migration change
- [ ] Docs

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` passes
- [ ] `npm run test` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds locally
- [ ] No secrets committed
